A. REGARDING PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR ORDER FILED 3/20/2025, THE ORDERS PETITIONER REQUESTS ARE ALREADY COVERED BY STATUTE. BOTH PARTIES ARE UNDER AN ONGOING OBLIGATION UNDER FAMILY CODE SECTION 2100(C) "TO IMMEDIATELY, FULLY, AND ACCURATELY UPDATE AND AUGMENT [THEIR FINANCIAL DISCLOSURES] TO THE EXTENT THERE HAVE BEEN ANY MATERIAL CHANGES." RESPONDENT STATES HE HAS FILED AN UPDATED INCOME AND EXPENSE DECLARATION AND THERE HAVE BEEN NO MATERIAL CHANGES SINCE. PETITIONER MAY CONDUCT DISCOVERY (AS IT APPEARS HE IS ALREADY DOING) IF HE BELIEVES A MATERIAL CHANGE IN RESPONDENT'S FINANCIAL SITUATION HAS OCCURRED WHICH RESPONDENT HAS NOT DISCLOSED. THE COURT'S ABILITY TO ISSUE SANCTIONS RELATED TO THESE ISSUES IS RESERVED. THE COURT MAKES NO FURTHER ORDERS REGARDING THESE ISSUES AT THIS TIME.
